prompt: A timeline of money leaving my account soon: upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date with the total going out.
wire:
export default function OutflowTimeline({ scheduled, recurring, scheduledRaw, recurringRaw }) { const payments = Array.isArray(scheduled) ? scheduled : (scheduledRaw?.data ?? []); const subs = Array.isArray(recurring) ? recurring : (recurringRaw?.subscriptions ?? []); const items = []; (payments || []).forEach(p => { const dateStr = p.nextDate || p.date || p.scheduledDate || p.dueDate || p.paymentDate; const amountCents = p.amountCents ?? p.amount ?? 0; items.push({ id: p.id || p.paymentId || Math.random(), label: p.payee || p.name || p.description || p.merchant || 'Payment', dateStr, amountCents, type: 'scheduled', }); }); (subs || []).forEach(s => { const dateStr = s.nextDate || s.nextBillingDate || s.renewalDate || s.date; const amountCents = s.amountCents ?? s.amount ?? 0; items.push({ id: s.id || s.subscriptionId || Math.random(), label: s.merchant || s.name || s.description || 'Subscription', dateStr, amountCents, type: 'subscription', }); }); items.sort((a, b) => { if (!a.dateStr && !b.dateStr) return 0; if (!a.dateStr) return 1; if (!b.dateStr) return -1; return new Date(a.dateStr).getTime() - new Date(b.dateStr).getTime(); }); const totalCents = items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + (i.amountCents || 0), 0); if (items.length === 0) { return ( ); } function formatDate(dateStr) { if (!dateStr) return '—'; const d = new Date(dateStr); if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return dateStr; const now = new Date('2026-07-21'); const diffDays = Math.round((d.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); const label = d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }); if (diffDays === 0) return `Today · ${label}`; if (diffDays === 1) return `Tomorrow · ${label}`; if (diffDays > 0 && diffDays <= 6) return `In ${diffDays} days · ${label}`; return label; } return ( {fmt.money(totalCents)} {items.length} {items.map((item, idx) => (
{item.type === 'subscription' ? '🔄' : '📅'}
{item.label} {formatDate(item.dateStr)} {item.amountCents ? `−${fmt.money(item.amountCents)}` : '—'} {item.type}
))} ); }

props.text: Upcoming scheduled payments and subscription renewals, ordered by date
